calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2006 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-20-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise (5) hearing this day.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carl Sauceda.
Gurinder S. Mann, Esq. for
Petitioner: Michele Ashford, present as Guardian at litem for: Avil Pittman, Jr. and Darvell Lynch, minor Claimants.
Petitioner: Michele A. Missouri, present as Guardian at litem for: Charles S. Missouri II, a Minor Claimant.
Petitioner: Alesia L. Williams, present as Guardian at litem for: Ayiesha Williams and Andrew Williams II, Minor Claimants.
Petitioners were sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, each Petition is granted and each compromise is approved as follows: Avil Pittman, Jr.: Settlement $11,700.00, Attorney's Fees $2,260.20, Costs $2,449.75, Balance of $6,990.05 to be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of the West,
3081 McKee Road, San Jose, CA. 95127.
Darvell Lynch: Settlement $110,250.00, Attorney's Fees $1,978.35, Costs $2,061.58, Balance of $6,210.07 to be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of the West, 3081 McKee Road, San Jose, CA. 95127.
Charles S. Missouri, II: Settlement 17,585.00, Attorney's Fees $3,437.56, Costs $4,550.79, Balance of $9,596.65 to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, Capitol Expressway & McKee Road, San Jose, CA.
Ayiesha Williams: Settlement $6,861.10, Attorney's Fees $1,020.20, Costs $299.00, Balance of $5,541.90 to be deposited into a blocked account with National First Credit Union, 2999 San Ysidro Way, Santa Clara, CA. 95051. Andrew Williams: Settlement $14,991.40, Attorney's Fees $2,433.26, Costs $2,192.39, Balance $10,365.75 to be deposited into a blocked account with National First Credit Union, 2999 San Ysidro Way, Santa Clara, CA. 95051.,
No withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Orders Approving Compromise of Claim and Orders to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2006 Continued To Sep-01-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
